channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Tica Dungeon Progress Bar - Sat Apr 25 08:45:56 UTC 2026
item.description:
Tica Dungeon Progress Bar Replace Rider's progress bars with a pixel-art dungeon-crawler animation starring Tica the orca warrior. Indexing, building, plugin updates...
vendor: Allen Huang downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.allen.dungeonprogress

item.title: Converse - Fri May 22 21:34:17 UTC 2026
item.description:
Run multiple AI agent sessions side-by-side inside IntelliJ with persistent conversation history, real-time streaming, and deep IDE integration.
vendor: 2 Small Cats LLC downloads: 14 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: technology.futureflow.converse

item.title: Web Browser Panel - Sat May 30 17:46:00 UTC 2026

vendor: Dervis Mansuroglu downloads: 58 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: no.dervis.webbrowser

item.title: Code Context Memo - Fri May 29 03:14:03 UTC 2026

vendor: AaronOhO downloads: 6 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.aaronoho.code-context-memo

vendor: zjarlin downloads: 6 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: site.addzero.recent-project-cleaner

item.title: GitLab Pipeline Watcher - Fri May 29 12:49:56 UTC 2026
